category_sources: Official README at https://github.com/arcress0/ipmiutil describes IPMI server management utilities for sensors, SEL, SOL, and power control.
source_facts.description says ipmiutil is an IPMI server management utility.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://ipmiutil.sourceforge.net/ and official repository https://github.com/arcress0/ipmiutil use the name ipmiutil.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/arcress0/ipmiutil documents purpose and features.
Official nav page at https://ipmiutil.sourceforge.net/nav.htm links to Users Guide and Man Pages.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge code browser also exposes the project Git repository at https://sourceforge.net/p/ipmiutil/code-git/ci/master/tree/.
source_facts.repo is empty; official ipmiutil nav page links to GitHub at https://github.com/arcress0/ipmiutil.
tags_sources: Official README at https://github.com/arcress0/ipmiutil lists sensors, events, remote console, power control, and vendor firmware handling.
